hi us ka virodhi tha chunki vo bjp  party se tha is liye.

Waqf ki zameenk pasr aa pna dharmik sthal bata kar unhekabzane wale.khud ik doosre ke hath bemot kat ke mar mar rahe he.muslim Dharam aur un ke Dharmik sthal ko bharat se khatm kar Hindh Rashtra karne wale kh doosro ke liye khode gaye gaddhe me khud dafan ho rahe he khudh apne hi sage khoon ke hatho.hd na kamal ki nat.upar wala mahar nan to gadha pahlwan ban jaata he.vo khud ko khuda se nehtra bhagan menne lag kaata he
Aur ja. Upar wale ke insaaf ki bari aati he to ini churiyon ke barabar ke adne zameen oar fasad felane wale shethani ko aisa zameen ar oatakhta he ki un ke ik oatke me hopran bahar nikal jaate he.fid un ki damga aur khudai Diniya me dhari ki thari rah jaayi he.
